title: Ship v9.6 Provider Execution Cost and Quota Boundary
description: Create provider execution cost and quota boundary evidence so AOF can block or escalate provider-backed execution when estimated cost, token usage, API quota, rate limit, budget owner, or billing uncertainty exceeds declared limits.
triage_notes: v9.6 provider execution cost/quota boundary implemented with runtime commands, schemas, product capability evidence, capability delta, Mission Control projection, maker/checker/council evidence, and focused tests.
